group_1.label: Weak default, few local options
group_1.description: Students are commonly assigned to weaker default high schools, and there are few CPS high schools located nearby.

group_2.label: Weak default and local schools
group_2.description: Both the assigned default schools and the high schools located in the area show weaker outcome patterns.

group_3.label: Weak local schools, better access
group_3.description: Schools located in the area look weaker, but assigned defaults or nearby selective access look stronger than the city pattern.

group_4.label: Few local schools, stronger default
group_4.description: There are few CPS high schools physically located in the area, but assigned defaults or access measures look stronger.

group_5.label: Stronger school/access pattern
group_5.description: Assigned schools, local schools, or selective access look stronger than the city pattern.
